opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg veins always ache by the end of the day, but today one of the bulging veins has turned into a hard, red, agonizingly painful cord.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A long history of bulging, aching leg veins, but over the last day one bulging vein on the left calf has become a hard, tender, red painful lump.

symptom_narrative.onset: the bulging veins and aching have been present for years; the hard red painful area came on over the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: long-standing veins with chronic aching; 24 hours of new localised pain, hardness and redness along one vein
symptom_narrative.character: usually a dull ache, heaviness and cramping; the new area is a hard, cord-like, intensely painful and itchy segment
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the new hard red area is agonisingly painful; she is limping to keep weight off the left leg
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: bulging veins on both lower legs; the new hard, red, painful cord is on the inner side of the left calf
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: chronic aching worse at the end of the day, with a new acutely painful hard area over the last day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: elevating the legs usually relieves the chronic ache
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: prolonged standing at work; the new hard area is tender to any touch
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the area is red and very itchy; denies whole-leg swelling, denies fever, denies chest pain or breathlessness
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: chronic aching and heaviness for years but nothing hard, red and painful like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally independent, but currently limping to avoid pressure on the painful left leg

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing bulging, twisted (varicose) veins on both lower legs with chronic aching and heaviness
past_medical_history.how_managed: self-manages with leg elevation; takes over-the-counter paracetamol

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter paracetamol for the pain, with little relief

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: job requires prolonged standing, which she feels makes the leg veins and aching worse; wears tight socks with elastic bands

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: worried the painful hard vein could be a dangerous clot; wants pain relief

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the chronic and the new acute change clearly

objective_data_offered.value: a roughly 5 cm hard, cord-like, red and warm segment along a bulging vein on the inner left calf, very tender; the rest of the leg looks its usual self with no big new swelling
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video description; the firmness of the cord and any DVT signs need clinician examination to confirm
self-reported that she does not feel feverish; not a clinician measurement
